Skul: The Hero Slayer

Control Skul, a brave skeleton warrior, through dangerous dungeon rooms filled with enemies. Collect unique skulls that transform your abilities, gather powerful items to enhance your stats, and earn Dark Quartz to unlock permanent upgrades. Each run is a fresh challenge - defeat enemies, swap skulls strategically, and survive as long as possible. Death means losing your current items and skulls, but your Dark Quartz remains for permanent progression!

Arrow Keys: Move left/right, navigate menus | Space: Attack with current skull's ability | Z: Swap between collected skulls | Shift: Dash (quick evasive movement) | Enter: Start game from title screen | Esc: Pause/Unpause game | R: Return to start screen after game over

Skul: The Hero Slayer

Control Skul, a brave skeleton warrior, through dangerous dungeon rooms filled with enemies. Collect unique skulls that transform your abilities, gather powerful items to enhance your stats, and earn Dark Quartz to unlock permanent upgrades. Each run is a fresh challenge - defeat enemies, swap skulls strategically, and survive as long as possible. Death means losing your current items and skulls, but your Dark Quartz remains for permanent progression!

Arrow Keys: Move left/right, navigate menus | Space: Attack with current skull's ability | Z: Swap between collected skulls | Shift: Dash (quick evasive movement) | Enter: Start game from title screen | Esc: Pause/Unpause game | R: Return to start screen after game over

TEST_3.expected: Player successfully collects multiple skulls, swaps between them smoothly, and each skull's unique abilities function as intended without errors.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests item collection and stat progression. Validates that items drop from enemies, can be collected, and properly enhance player stats.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Focus on defeating enemies and collecting all dropped items. Monitor stat changes and ensure buffs are applied correctly to player attributes.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Items drop consistently from defeated enemies, player successfully collects them, and stats increase appropriately. UI displays updated stats correctly.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests death and progression systems. Validates game over conditions, Dark Quartz persistence, and proper state transitions between runs.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Allow player to take damage and reach game over state. Verify that Dark Quartz is retained, items/skulls are lost, and game can restart properly.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game correctly transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE when HP reaches zero. Dark Quartz persists between runs while temporary items reset appropriately.
